root_cause: Controller ownership conflict between active ReplicaSets is stalling the workload rollout
evidence: Pod 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9-x7l9m' is owned by ReplicaSet 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9' but its labels now match active ReplicaSet 'checkout-9c7fd98c54' instead
Recent controller activity spans 17.0 minutes across 5 rollout-related events with 2 ownership conflict signal(s)
Representative ownership conflict: ReplicaSet "checkout-9c7fd98c54" cannot adopt Pod "checkout-74d5d8f6b9-x7l9m": Pod already has controller reference to ReplicaSet/checkout-74d5d8f6b9
Deployment 'checkout' remains at 2/4 available replicas with only 2/4 updated replicas and ProgressDeadlineExceeded
Pod 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9-x7l9m' is still Pending while controller ownership remains contested

causes.message: Multiple active controller paths are targeting the same Pod identity during rollout
Pod labels and controller ownership metadata disagree about which ReplicaSet should manage the Pod
Controller reconciliation cannot converge because rollout and adoption decisions keep colliding
Workload rollout remains below target availability (2/4) while controller ownership is unresolved

pod:checkout-74d5d8f6b9-x7l9m: Pod 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9-x7l9m' is owned by ReplicaSet 'checkout-74d5d8f6b9' but its labels now match active ReplicaSet 'checkout-9c7fd98c54' instead
replicaset:checkout-74d5d8f6b9: Current controller owner recorded in ownerReferences
replicaset:checkout-9c7fd98c54: Competing active ReplicaSet also targets the Pod during rollout
deployment:checkout: Deployment 'checkout' remains at 2/4 available replicas with only 2/4 updated replicas and ProgressDeadlineExceeded

likely_causes: A rollout revision or copied controller introduced a selector that overlaps with another active ReplicaSet
Manual label or ownerReference edits left an existing Pod owned by one ReplicaSet while another controller revision now also matches it
GitOps or automation reapplied controller objects with broadened selectors, causing competing ownership during rollout
The workload cannot converge until each Pod is matched by exactly one active controller path
suggested_checks: Compare ReplicaSet selectors, template labels, and ownerReferences with `kubectl get rs -o yaml`
Review recent deployment and ReplicaSet controller events around the conflicting rollout window
